submission.title: What type is this
submission.body:
I've been a self harm for over half my life but only recently found online community about it all, so I don't know what all the names for depths are, what is this ? I'm mainly just curious,

 and would they qualify for being stitched ? Obviously they could be at home healed can't get these stitched or stapled anyway because time frame

comments.body:
It looks like it went down to the fat. They call it “beans” on here but I really hate saying beans because it makes me feel uncomfortable.

Please get stitches.
Hypodermis, stitches recommended
It's generally adviced to get stitches if a wound is over 5mm wide or has exposed fat.
Yeah calling it beans is ,, interesting , but ty ☺️☺️ can't get stitches tho:-((
Is mine either of that? <3
Yes both
Ty for replying <33
Go buy steri-strips,  it's not as good as stitches but it helps to close the wound and heal faster.

Noooo not the tattoo :(
I am sorry buddy.

As some said before me, it's pretty deep and you better get it checked out by a professional
That's the hypodermis layer (fat), you should close that wound up. Hope this heals well ♡
Oh no not the tattoo
That’s what I was thinking :(

submission.title: Help?
submission.body: This is on my neck, not deep by any means but it is slightly 'wide' the problem is I didn't mean to do it, I disassociate a lot and this was the outcome of this "episode" anyway my question - is there any point trying to steri strip it? I don't want a scar I really really really don't but it 100% doesn't warrant glue or any other kind of clousers,  but I do own steri strips - they'd probably just fall off? If they're even necessarily ?

comments.body: If you can't get medical attention for whatever reason I would recommend steri strips :] make sure to keep it clean but I really think you should go to a doctor for it <3

I don't think I need medical attention, the only reason for it would be to reduce scarring but if I can do that with just steri then that's what ill do, going ro the hospital/ doctors is very triggering <3
Okay, I hope it heals well <3 :]
You definitely need medical attention, but if thats not an option, opt for steri strips
What medical attention be needed? I don't think it's been enough for that, maybe the photo makes it look worse than it is ?

It’s not just the depth (which warrants at least closure on its own), it’s the placement. The neck, especially the side of the neck, is an *extremely* risky spot- both for the initial injury and for possible infection afterwards. Please get medical attention if you can, and if you can’t then close it and keep a close eye on it.

submission.title: 0izysanneith
submission.body: Can someone just tell me how she's alive?? I know its not on her to explain and she doesn't mention ed much but she does do body checks a lot and has just been so worryingly thin??, 0izysanneith is her tiktok

comments.body: I really don’t know. Someone needs to get her help. I know she has other things going on but I feel like it would really benefit her overall mental health if she were a healthier weight.
Im confused as how shes been sectioned but no made to gain weight? In her state how is she not on bed rest? Surely shes a liability to the hospital shes in.
Exactly that hospital is being negligent
Absolutely, when you're fueling your body it also fuels your brain

lmaoo she’s been doing this for years atp she just loves the attention that the body check tiktoks give her. and as for the no weight gain for years idk it seems pretty on-brand for the uk ed girlies they’re all always ip for ages without any weight change, it baffles me LMFAO. they would notttttt allow that anywhere here

I literally dont understand, like she is under ed care, not in a specific ed ward cos they cant take her due to her general mh, but they are still under her care as she has said before. but how do they not keep track of her weight, whether she had anorexia or not, that state is so damaging for her health. either, they dont care (which is very unlikely) or she fakes her weight, or exercises but she has had 1-1's before so I rlly dont understand.. like its concerning. and im sure she said in a live she eats in her bedroom, idk if people even watch her. and how has she been in the same unit for like more then a year, the care she is under must be clueless
Is she in the US?
nooo uk
Unless she’s on the chronic/SEED pathway which is basically just improve quality of life rather than force weight gain

I think a lot of the no weight change girlies are on the spectrum. As someone also autistic, I can confirm that Ed services really don’t know what to do with you and just kind of make sure you’re alive and kicking still but that’s about it. We’re too complicated apparently 🫠
I mean obviously the weight stuff isn’t autism but the idea of change and also aversion to textures and stuff can make the typical recovery pathway a bit messier

I can’t believe that they don’t do anything about it. She could drop dead any minute. Also don’t understand how they haven’t sorted out her housing situation. She’s been inpatient for like years and she’s in an acute mental health ward as well. Crazy
They all think we are either picky, disregulated and using food to cope, or both. It’s always the asd that everybody blames 🙄

Yep. I wish more people would give us a chance. Like other than some texture aversions and hating change , my asd has absolutely nothing to do with my Ed and the root causes/cognitions but Ed services can’t seem to fathom that for a lot of people🤦🏼‍♀️

submission.title: Healing
submission.body: They were being over dramatic and stapled it which is completely a waste of services but yeah,  thsg didn't say how long they should stay in ? Ouch

comments.body: U can google that, also how deep was the cut?
You can see the cut if you click on their page and scroll down
Oh it was that one I saw it. Yeah kinda overdramatic to staple it, stitches would have been enough.
It wasn't that one, that was on the other side <3 but yeah,  100% staples were unnecessary
Oh shit sorry, thought it was the same one, mb
Easy mistake I'd only posted the other side before 💓
Google says 5 days but to remove with a special kind of staple remover

submission.title: i need validation please..i’ll delete this afterwards…
submission.body: these are my arms and i fucking hate them. i honestly don’t think they can be called “scars” or “wounds”. they’re nothing..also..thoughts on being able to cut over these? i assume it’s fine because these haven’t even scratched the surface of how deep my body can take..i just fucking HATE it. i bleed so much and for what?!

comments.body: i didn’t mean to add the same photo twice
This is valid. All self harm is valid. Im sorry that you had to go through this, stay strong <3

Oh hunny..your poor arms..I can assure you it's already bad. Please don't let it get worse, it'll be the biggest regret you'll ever have. I promise you, I promise, it is bad. You go deep enough, no matter what your thoughts are telling you. Your problems matter. Your issues matter. Your self harm matters. Just as much as anyone elses
i have literal tears in my eyes from the way u just spoke to me 😭💕
but how is it bad when it doesn’t even scar…
ppl here are so sweet <3
If you need someone I'll be here for you🫂

The marks it leaves behind does not define the severity. Everybody heals differently. Sweetheart, the fact you have to resort to harming yourself in itself makes it bad. You have to self harm to feel okay. Even though you can't see the damage left behind, it will be there with you hunny. It is bad, I swear

Don't worry mate , everyone who selfharms in whatever way needs to be given help in any way  possible . Your cuts are similar to mine , so don't feel that you are alone , I'm with you <33 , and so are the other members of this sub.
Remember you are important and have worth, your mental illness is not defined by the marks it leaves. You deserve just as much help as anyone else❤️
i will be called a liar until the day i die if i don’t have highly visible scars…thank you though..you’re really sweet 😭. i wish i never picked up that blade or was in that bathroom that one day.

i have felt that i was alone for the longest of times. i have never once not seen any dies scars or wounds that are less worser than mine and it hurts. it physically hurts my chest knowing i practically have nothing underneath my sleeves..i just can’t stand it anymore and i haven’t worn short sleeves for two entire years. the next time i do it has to be worth it..it has to be when my arms are completely covered in long..red..raised..just scars. i’ll never be taken seriously if i don’t have them, even doctors.
You will be taken seriously, have you ever talked to a therapist or a doctor about your sh?
yes and the only good experience i ever had was a few minutes with a nurse for when i was in hospital, that i cried to and trusted who actually didn’t betray my trust
So the doctors/ therapists whom you consulted didn't take your problem seriously?
no; i mean who would. youve seen the photo..they aren’t scars nor wounds so for anyone who looks at them says i am not a danger to myself

The people who say that are fxckin A holes , you should be taken seriously , this is what the initial stage of self harm looks like , it starts with cat scratches and then ends at total mutilation/suicide .

I would advise you to talk to other psychiatrists /therapists if possible . It would be even better if you ask for help from your parents .

Self harm is self harm, the severity is only a small part of it, the intention is the biggest, any urge or action to hurt yourself is serious and deserves support. It doesn't matter how the self harm looks, it's valid and it needs to be taken seriously. People who aren't unwell don't self harm, you deserve to be able to get better

i don’t normally leave comments but i do want to let you know. i was in your exact position when i was 14. i saw a girl in my class with scars while i was already battling depression, i had no SH urges at the time because i had other coping mechanisms, but i thought to myself hmm.. if i could have all these cuts on my body, that could make people realise that i need real help. so i did it. i’m now 19, i’ve come far mentally and i think everything that happened over the years has matured me as a person. i have permanent scars over my arms, legs, stomach and face, and trust me, it is the worst i’ve ever regretted anything. i know what it’s like from your perspective, and if i was to go back in time and tell 14 year old me that there is literally no benefit to having scars, she would roll her eyes in front of my face and continue anyway, it’s frustrating. there WILL be a point where your mind will come to peace, and you’ll realise how unimportant scars are. now they just sit there, making me get laughed at in public and ruining every sweet moment in my life if i’m wearing short sleeves. if i don’t want to ruin a nice event for other people, i have to cover up. i’ve ruined weddings, christmas’s and birthdays by just trying to get by in whatever clothes i want because people get unsettled by the scars being near them, it’s a normal human reaction. i think it makes it harder to find a relationship too, i thought i was hitting it off with this guy from school, took my jacket off to cool down and he gave this subtle grossed out look for a second when he saw my arms, and then he seemed to have lost interest the day after. there are absolutely 0 benefits to scars. the only good thing about them ever existing for me is the excuse to get cover up tattoos and my parents wouldn’t be mad. even at first you might feel proud if you notice you have scarred, but it’ll get old real fast no matter what. i sometimes think that 50 years from now, i could have grandkids who love me for being the cool grandma with tattoos and likes to paint, and they wouldn’t base their love for me off the fact that i have some weird old scars all over my body that i did when i was a sad 14 year old. 
i know this is probably a long message, but i know it takes a lot more than this to convince someone with your mindset that it is in fact not worth it, as i know exactly what it’s like to be there. you just can’t see it, you just can’t see how someone would hate their scars when that’s all you want. i wish i would’ve known that just the fact that i was taking a blade to my skin at all, it was a sign i needed help. even when some of my cuts were so shallow that they didn’t even bleed, i still needed help. YOU, are most definitely in need of help, and you should reach out to a professional because you are having those thoughts

Hey I’m going to try to keep this as brief as possible but I have a lot to say and hope it will be meaningful to you and help you feel better! 


I want to start off with saying, my biggest deepest scars, didn’t come from when I was in the most emotional pain. My biggest scar came from when I was doing school work, which was stressful, but nowhere near other problems in my life and likely nowhere near yours either. Some of my other deeper scars came from the night I made my deepest, and the rest of my deepest scars came from times where i just got an urge to cut even tho I was just fine or a little bored. 


Most of the cuts I made when I was in the most emotional pain were always lighter than when I I was feeling fine and just got an urge. Most of them didn’t even scar either. What I’m trying to say with this is, the depth of your cuts ≠ the amount of pain you are going through mentally. Your pain and self harm is just as valid as those who, with sharpest razors, carve the deepest holes into their area of self harm. 


If feeling like you are “too big of a wuss” to be able to handle the pain of going deeper, is something you struggle with, I want you to know that could not be further from the truth. I’ve found that lighter cuts can be even more painful than ones that go deeper, so please don’t convince yourself you are just ‘chicken shit’ or ‘faking your sh’ (I’ve felt the same way before too), because it is not the truth and again, depth should absolutely not be seen as the indicator of severity. 


Your cuts are valid, and I can see that you are going through so much mentally and emotionally. There is more I would like to say abt this, so I plan to return to this comment and add more, but for now i need to get myself ready as I am already running a little late. I hope what I’ve said so far will be helpful to you and help you feel better, please stay safe!
